hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs, regulatory rules and case management into one compliance layer to help VASPs manage ADGM reporting with clear audit trails and workflow control.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Reporting workflows slow across disconnected tools
problem_description: Compliance teams managing ADGM regulatory reporting face delays and errors when case data, provider outputs, and Travel Rule messages remain siloed across multiple systems. This fragmentation weakens audit trails and complicates timely preparation of regulator-ready evidence packages.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects case data, provider outputs and Travel Rule messages into a unified workflow that supports timely preparation, audit-ready evidence and consistent regulatory reporting for ADGM compliance teams.
workflow_title: From case creation to ADGM reporting
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider checks, alerts and case evidence into structured workflows that support compliant reporting and audit readiness for ADGM requirements.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY integrates disparate ADGM compliance outputs into one workflow that supports structured review, decision tracking, evidence preservation and audit-ready reporting for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for ADGM compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects provider outputs, applies ADGM-specific rules, supports case management and structures reporting workflows workflows for VASP compliance teams in ADGM.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure ADGM reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures reporting by linking cases, alerts and evidence into workflow stages with review, decision logging and report drafting tailored to ADGM regulatory requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready ADGM evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive evidence packages, decision logs and review history supporting audit readiness and regulatory inspections within the ADGM compliance context.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates provider outputs across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools as a controlled operational layer without disrupting existing compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace ADGM Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows and case management tailored to ADGM compliance obligations.
final_title: Structure ADGM reporting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, regulatory rules and cases into audit-ready ADGM compliance workflows.
